title: AgentMcpNats
description: NATS subjects for the dd MCP servers (dd-gleam-mcp-server today). MCP servers publish tool-call audit + lifecycle telemetry to McpToolEvents and subscribe to McpControl for read-only operational commands. The MCP surface and its Kubernetes service account are read-only, so control commands must never mutate cluster state and payloads must not contain secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: MCP server tool-call audit telemetry (publish) and operational control commands (subscribe).

subjects.name: McpToolEvents
subjects.description: Tool-call audit and lifecycle telemetry emitted by MCP servers: one event per tools/call (tool name, ok/error flag, duration) plus a lifecycle event on boot. Fan-out telemetry consumed by observability/log shippers. Payloads carry a dd.mcp_event.v1 envelope and must not contain secrets or raw cluster data.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.mcp.tool.events

subjects.name: McpControl
subjects.description: Read-only operational control commands addressed to MCP servers, e.g. {"command":"ping"} for a liveness echo onto McpToolEvents. Broadcast with no queue group so every MCP replica receives each command. Commands must never mutate cluster state; the MCP service account only has list/read RBAC.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.mcp.control
